original_hypothesis.title: yieldFeePercentage = FEE_PRECISION (100%) Causes Division by Zero in liquidate()
original_hypothesis.hypothesis_description: The `_setYieldFeePercentage` function allows setting the fee to exactly `FEE_PRECISION` (1e9) since the check uses `>` instead of `>=`. In `liquidate()`, the yield fee calculation `(_amountOut * FEE_PRECISION) / (FEE_PRECISION - _yieldFeePercentage)` produces division by zero when `_yieldFeePercentage == FEE_PRECISION`, permanently bricking the liquidation mechanism.
original_hypothesis.investigation_rationale: The boundary check `if (yieldFeePercentage_ > FEE_PRECISION)` allows the value FEE_PRECISION to pass. When set, the denominator in liquidate's yield fee calculation becomes zero. Since liquidation is the only mechanism to convert yield to prizes, this permanently halts prize generation.

proof_of_signal.pattern: if (yieldFeePercentage_ > FEE_PRECISION) — uses > not >=, allowing FEE_PRECISION value

initial_code_evidence.vulnerable_pattern: Off-by-one in boundary check; > instead of >=

analysis_questions: Confirm the boundary check allows exactly FEE_PRECISION
Confirm liquidate reverts with division by zero at FEE_PRECISION
Is there any other path to recover or bypass the bricked state?
validation_requirements: Set yieldFeePercentage to FEE_PRECISION, attempt liquidation, verify revert

original_hypothesis.preliminary_attack_scenario: Owner (malicious or mistaken) calls setYieldFeePercentage(1e9). All subsequent liquidation calls revert. Prize generation halts permanently for this vault.
prerequisites: Owner action to set fee to 100%

potential_impact_if_confirmed.financial_impact: Permanent halt of prize generation for the vault; yield accumulates but cannot be converted
potential_impact_if_confirmed.affected_users: All vault depositors lose prize eligibility permanently
potential_impact_if_confirmed.recovery_possibility: Owner can reset fee to a valid value, restoring liquidation

original_hypothesis.test_coverage_gap: Missing boundary test for yieldFeePercentage == FEE_PRECISION

validation_result.impact_summary: Filtered before validation: attack_realism is LOW
validation_result.detailed_analysis: This hypothesis was auto-rejected because its attack_realism grade is LOW. Preconditions require actions outside the attacker's control (off-chain compromise, victim cooperation, or admin collusion). No LLM validation was performed.
